summary: A practical guide to dynamic hyperinflation, intrinsic PEEP measurement, ventilator settings for obstructive physiology, permissive hypercapnia, hypotension after intubation, external PEEP, bronchodilator delivery, and emergency management of severe air trapping.

title: Fluid Responsiveness and Resuscitation Without Fluid Overload

title: Goals of Care, Time-Limited Trials, and Post-ICU Syndrome

summary: Resident-level guide to shock including hypovolemic, distributive, cardiogenic, and obstructive shock, hemodynamic profiles, cardiac output, SVR, mixed venous oxygen saturation, wedge pressure, and treatment strategies.

title: Syncope: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to syncope including vasovagal syncope, orthostatic hypotension, cardiogenic syncope, orthostatic vital signs, red flags, telemetry, EKG evaluation, and the San Francisco Syncope Rule.

title: Ventricular Tachycardia Management: A Practical Guide for Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to ventricular tachycardia management including non-sustained VT, sustained VT, stable vs unstable VT, antiarrhythmics, cardioversion, PVC burden, VT storm, and incessant VT.

title: Wide Complex Tachycardia: VT vs SVT With Aberrancy
summary: Resident-level guide to evaluating wide complex tachycardias including VT versus SVT with aberrancy, Brugada criteria, AV dissociation, capture beats, fusion beats, concordance, and ECG interpretation pearls.

summary: Resident-level guide to acid-base disorders including ABG/VBG interpretation, primary disorder identification, anion gap calculation, albumin correction, NAGMA vs HAGMA, osmolar gap, Winter

title: Acute Coronary Syndrome (ACS): STEMI, NSTEMI, Unstable Angina Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to Acute Coronary Syndrome including STEMI, NSTEMI, unstable angina, ECG interpretation, troponins, risk stratification, PCI vs CABG, and guideline-based management.

title: Atrial Fibrillation: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Comprehensive resident-level review of atrial fibrillation including ECG diagnosis, stroke prevention, anticoagulation, rate versus rhythm control, AF with RVR, antiarrhythmics, cardioversion, and board pearls.

title: Hyponatremia: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to hyponatremia including serum osmolality, volume status, urine sodium, urine osmolality, SIADH, hypovolemic and hypervolemic causes, and safe correction strategies.

title: ICU Pressors, Sedation, Analgesia, and Paralysis: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Resident-level ICU guide to vasopressors, inotropes, sedation, analgesia, RASS goals, and neuromuscular blockade with practical dosing, side effects, and bedside decision-making.

title: Mechanical Ventilation in the ICU
summary: High-yield review of mechanical ventilation, ventilator modes, ARDS, ventilator settings, weaning, extubation, and ICU management.

title: Pneumonia: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to pneumonia including CAP, HAP, VAP, antibiotic selection, MRSA and Pseudomonas risk factors, aspiration pneumonia, diagnostic testing, treatment duration, vaccination, and common clinical pitfalls.

title: Practice-Changing Updates in Internal Medicine (2025–2026)
summary: Resident-focused review of recent guideline updates and high-impact studies affecting hospital medicine, including acute MI transfusion thresholds, complicated UTI duration, CAP updates, AI in medicine, hypertonic saline in heart failure, ultrasound-guided lumbar puncture, automated ventilator weaning, lithium and Alzheimer disease, SSRI-associated hyponatremia, and neuroimmunology.

title: Running a Code Blue: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents

title: Urinary Tract Infections: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: A practical resident-level guide to urinary tract infections, including simple cystitis, complicated UTI, pyelonephritis, inpatient and outpatient antibiotics, urinalysis interpretation, asymptomatic bacteriuria, catheter-associated UTI, recurrent UTI, and resistant organisms.
